center.name: 聖尼古勞島
center.summary: 聖尼古勞島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cape Verde warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: After a specimen was found in a Lisbon museum, a survey was made on São Nicolau island in 1998 and some individuals were found there.{{cite journal|last=Hazevoet |first=C
